snapshot.title: Fix performance, duplication, and async issues in frontend and mobile
snapshot.description: Comprehensive fixes for issues identified in audit: performance optimizations, code deduplication, memory leak prevention, and async issue resolution

acceptanceCriteria.text: Frontend: Add user feedback for rate-limited actions
Frontend: Add error boundaries at route level
Frontend: Add redirect lock in CampusGuard
Frontend: Implement comment pagination
Mobile: Add try-catch for image picker
Mobile: Add mounted checks before showModalBottomSheet
Mobile: Consolidate setState calls
Mobile: Extract repeated widgets (SearchTextField, CardListItem)
Mobile: Parallelize API calls with Future.wait

changes.newValue: Cross-repo audit 2026-02-12: fixed mobile attendance test DI, async discarded futures, backend bulk attendance duplicate guard + batched validation, role user validation parallelized; mobile tests pass, backend tests pass, lint debt remains pre-existing
